artifact: Returns the five driver reference names with the largest q1 times in raceId 20, matching first-period elimination.
sql:
SELECT d."driverRef"
FROM qualifying q
JOIN drivers d ON q."driverId" = d."driverId"
WHERE q."raceId" = 20
ORDER BY q.q1 DESC
LIMIT 5;

raw_response.sql:
SELECT d."driverRef"
FROM qualifying q
JOIN drivers d ON q."driverId" = d."driverId"
WHERE q."raceId" = 20
ORDER BY q.q1 DESC
LIMIT 5;
